title: Introduction to Data Science
text:
Welcome to the Introduction to Data Science course!
This interactive textbook runs Python completely in your browser without requiring any installation or servers!
Navigate through the chapters using the sidebar to begin your journey.

title: 2  Introduction
text:
Welcome to the first chapter. Below is a standard, static Python cell. It is executed purely at render-time, and its outputs are frozen into the resulting page:

print("This is a standard cell. It runs when the book is rendered by Quarto.")

This is a standard cell. It runs when the book is rendered by Quarto.


Below is an interactive quarto-live Pyodide cell. You can edit and run it right in your browser!
